pilot_signal_strength.evidence: 10 hypotheses tested across 10 iterations. 5 supported (H1/H3/H7/H7-cross/H8), 1 mixed (H10), 4 transparent negatives. Universal causal mechanism d=0.75-1.50. Writing gate: GO_WRITE.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: Core hypotheses H1 (cross-domain variation), H7 (universal causal mechanism), H8 (decoder entanglement) all survived. H10 (probe degradation) produced publishable MIXED result. No main hypothesis falsified.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Writing gate passed. All experiments complete. 15 corrections propagated. 4/4 figures generated. 5 appendix sections compiled. Paper in final-polish phase.

novelty.evidence: Novelty 7/10 overall. Cross-domain characterization 7, universal causal mechanism 8, probe degradation ablation 8. No competing work as of April 2026.

resource_efficiency.evidence: 3.5 GPU-hours this iteration. All critical experiments complete. Paper-ready state achieved.

novelty.evidence: 8/10, zero prior work on ecological competition in SAE absorption.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H10 city-language outlier suggests genuine within-hierarchy effects.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Natural extension, could be added to front-runner paper.

reasons: Front-runner scored 4.85/5.00 vs next-best backup at 2.70/5.00 -- overwhelming margin
All 10 hypotheses tested: 5 supported, 1 mixed (H10 publishable), 4 transparent negatives
Universal causal mechanism confirmed across all hierarchy types (d=0.75-1.50, all p<1e-17)
H10 probe degradation ablation successfully decomposes variation: probe quality + genuine hierarchy effect
Writing gate passed: GO_WRITE. Paper in final-polish phase with all experiments complete
Quadruple failure of correlational predictors (GAS/CMI/T(G)/rate-distortion) is itself a key finding
No competing cross-domain absorption work as of April 2026 (novelty check verified)
Only 3.5 GPU-hours invested this iteration, all critical results obtained
next_actions: Proceed to writing/editing phase -- writing gate has passed with GO_WRITE
Generate final integrated paper draft incorporating all iter_010 results
Include H10 probe degradation ablation as new Section 4.6

Address MEDIUM-priority OI2 (more probe degradation levels) in camera-ready if time permits
Target venue: NeurIPS 2026 main / ICLR 2027 main. Fallback: EMNLP 2026 / NeurIPS MI Workshop
Monitor competition: SAEBench extensions to cross-domain absorption

key_evidence.h1_cross_domain: SUPPORTED_WITH_NUANCE: Kruskal-Wallis p=0.005. Range: 11.6%-45.1% (4.1x). H10 decomposes: probe quality confound + genuine hierarchy effect.
key_evidence.h7_causal_mechanism: SUPPORTED universally: d=1.33 (first-letter), d=1.50 (city-continent), d=0.75 (city-language). All p<1e-17.
key_evidence.h8_decoder_magnitude: CONSISTENT cross-hierarchy: first-letter 5.99 nats, city-continent 3.98 nats. Both 100% pathological at all thresholds.
key_evidence.h10_probe_degradation: MIXED: city-continent matches curve (delta=-3.2pp), city-language genuine outlier (delta=-23.9pp). Both probe quality AND hierarchy effects confirmed.
key_evidence.h9_rate_distortion: NOT_SUPPORTED: 131 pairs, model rho=0.286, R^2=0.104. All individual predictors in wrong direction.
key_evidence.negative_results_theme: Quadruple failure of correlational predictors (GAS/CMI/T(G)/rate-distortion). Absorption requires causal methods.
key_evidence.writing_gate: GO_WRITE with all gate checks passed

sanity_checks.inconclusive_pilot_handled: H10 MIXED result is a publishable answer, not deferred -- ADVANCE is evidence-based, not inertia
